debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)) (input : fields 254 (F p)),
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
      (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
              Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127) =
                Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
              (Num2Bits.circuit 135 (Circomlib.CompConstant.main._proof_5 p inst✝)).Spec (env.get (offset + 127))
                  (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))) ∧
                env.get
                    (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
                  Expression.eval env
                    (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] →
          env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) =
            if fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c then 1 else 0

    let f (i : Fin 127) : ℤ :=
      let xi := (c >>> (2 * i.val)) &&& 3
      let si := input[2 * i.val].val.toNat + 2 * input[2 * i.val + 1].val.toNat

    rw [h_out, (Num2Bits.circuit 135 _).Spec_def.mp h_num2bits.1]

intros offset env input_var input h_input_var h_input_bits h_parts h_sout h_num2bits h_out
    rw [h_out, ← h_num2bits.1]
    have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
    have h_parts_val : ∀ i : Fin 127, (Expression.eval env (parts i)).val = if (input[2*i+1].val*2 + input[2*i].val) > (c >>> (2*i)) &&& 3 then 2^128 - 2^i else if (input[2*i+1].val*2 + input[2*i].val) < (c >>> (2*i)) &&& 3 then 2^i else 0 := by
      intro i; simp only [h_input_var] at h_parts; simp only [h_parts, Vector.ofFn_get]; split_ifs <;> (have h0 := h_input_bits (2*i) (by omega); have h1 := h_input_bits (2*i+1) (by omega); revert h0 h1; generalize (input[2*i]) = s0; generalize (input[2*i+1]) = s1; intros; cases h0 <;> cases h1 <;> simp [*, ZMod.val_neg, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt, hp])
    have h_sout_val : (env.get (offset + 127)).val = (Finset.univ.sum fun i => if (input[2*i+1].val*2 + input[2*i].val) > (c >>> (2*i)) &&& 3 then 2^128 - 2^i else if (input[2*i+1].val*2 + input[2*i].val) < (c >>> (2*i)) &&& 3 then 2^i else 0) := by
      rw [h_sout, Vector.sum_map_eval, ZMod.val_sum_of_fintype]; rotate_left; linarith; simp only [h_parts_val]; rfl
    let v i := input[2*i+1].val * 2 + input[2*i].val
    let ci i := (c >>> (2*i)) &&& 3
    let R : ℤ := Finset.univ.sum fun i => if v i < ci i then (2^i : ℤ) else if v i > ci i then -(2^i : ℤ) else 0
    let m : ℤ := (Finset.univ.filter fun i => v i > ci i).card
    have h_val : (env.get (offset + 127)).val = (m * 2^128 + R).toNat := by
      rw [h_sout_val]; simp [m, R, Finset.sum_itE]; congr; funext i; split_ifs <;> simp
    have h_bit : ((m * 2^128 + R).toNat / 2^127) % 2 = if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0 := by
      have hR : |R| < 2^{127} := by
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt (abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _)
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => by split_ifs <;> simp))
        simp; exact Nat.geom_sum_lt_pow_last 2 127
      have h_cmp : fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c ↔ ∃ k, v k > ci k ∧ ∀ j > (k : Fin 127), v j = ci j := by
        simp only [fromBits_def, Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.ofFn_get, Nat.fromBits_chunk 2]; rfl
      split_ifs with hgt
      · obtain ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩ := h_cmp.1 hgt; have hm : m ≥ 1 := by simp [m]; apply Finset.card_pos.2; use k; simp [hk1]
        have hRgt : R ≤ -1 := by
          simp [R, Finset.sum_itE]; rw [Finset.sum_itE]; simp;
          have : (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => v i < ci i ∧ j > i)).sum (fun i => (2^i : ℤ)) - 2^k < 0 := by sorry
          sorry
        simp [Nat.testBit_to_val, Nat.testBit_mod_two_pow]; sorry
      · sorry
    rw [h_val, h_bit]

    rcases h_all with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_num.1.2, ← h_num.1.1, h_sout, Expression.eval_sum]
    have h_bi i (hi : i < 254) : (input[i]).val = 0 ∨ (input[i]).val = 1 := by

    have h_pi (i : Fin 127) : (Expression.eval env (var { index := offset + i })).val =
        let si := (input[2*i+1]).val * 2 + (input[2*i]).val

      have h_i := congr_arg (fun v => v[i]) h_parts
      simp only [Vector.map_apply, Vector.mapRange_apply, Expression.eval_var, Vector.ofFn_get, Vector.get_map] at h_i; rw [h_i]

      repeat (rcases h_bi (2*i.val) (by omega) with h1 | h1 ; rcases h_bi (2*i.val+1) (by omega) with h2 | h2 <;> rw [h1, h2]) <;>
      repeat (first | rw [ZMod.val_neg] | rw [ZMod.val_mul] | rw [ZMod.val_add] | rw [ZMod.val_sub] | rw [ZMod.val_one] | rw [ZMod.val_zero]) <;>
      simp [Fact.out (*)] <;> split_ifs <;> try ring <;> try omega
    rw [ZMod.val_sum, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by
      have h_pl i : (Expression.eval env (var { index := offset + i.val })).val ≤ 2^128 := by rw [h_pi]; split_ifs <;> omega
      calc (∑ i : Fin 127, _) ≤ 127 * 2^128 := by gcongr; apply h_pl
        _ < p := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]), Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ => h_pi i]
    generalize h_X : (∑ i : Fin 127, _) = X
    have : X / 2^127 % 2 = if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0 := by

      have h_c : c = ∑ i : Fin 127, ((c >>> (2*i+1) &&& 1) * 2 + (c >>> (2*i) &&& 1)) * 4^i.val := by
        sorry
      sorry
    exact this

    have h_p : p > 2^135 := by linarith [Fact.elim (inst := inst✝)]
    have h_S_bits : S = (Vector.map (ZMod.val) (Num2Bits.circuit 135 h_p (env.get (offset + 127))).out).fromBits := h_sum.symm
    have h_bit127 : (env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135))[127].val = (S / 2^127) % 2 := by

intros offset env input_var input h_var h_in h_all
    rcases h_all with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_spec, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_spec.1]
    let v (i : Fin 127) := ZMod.val (input[2 * i.1 + 1]) * 2 + ZMod.val (input[2 * i.1])
    let ci (i : Fin 127) := (c >>> (2 * i.1 + 1) &&& 1) * 2 + (c >>> (2 * i.1) &&& 1)
    have h_p_val : ∀ i, Expression.eval env (parts_val i) = if v i > ci i then (2^128 - 2^i.1 : F p) else if v i < ci i then (2^i.1 : F p) else 0 := by
      intro i; dsimp [v, ci]; split_ifs <;> (simp [Expression.eval, h_var, *]; ring)
    have h_sout_val : env.get (offset + 127) = ∑ i, if v i > ci i then (2^128 - 2^i.1 : F p) else if v i < ci i then (2^i.1 : F p) else 0 := by
      rw [h_sout, ← h_parts, Vector.sum_ofFn]; congr; ext i; exact h_p_val i
    let S := ∑ i, if v i > ci i then (2^128 - 2^i.1 : ℤ) else if v i < ci i then (2^i.1 : ℤ) else 0
    have h_sout_S : (env.get (offset + 127)).val = S.toNat := by
      rw [h_sout_val]; simp only [ZMod.val_sum_toNat, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt]
      have : 0 ≤ S ∧ S < p := by
        constructor
        · apply Nat.toNat_non_neg
        · have : S ≤ 127 * (2^128) := by
            apply le_trans (List.sum_le_max _ _)
            simp only [List.length_ofFn, Nat.cast_le, List.map_ofFn]; sorry
          linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      sorry
    have h_bit : (S.toNat >>> 127) &&& 1 = if fromBits (Vector.map ZMod.val input) > c then 1 else 0 := by
      simp only [fromBits, Vector.map_map, Vector.ofFn_get]; sorry
    rw [h_sout_S, h_bit]

intros offset env input_var input h_input_eval h_input_bits
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, h_num2bits.out_eq_num2bits, h_sout]
    simp [h_input_eval, h_parts]
    sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_var h_bits
    simp only [Expression.eval_map, h_var, Expression.eval, Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.map_map] at *
    rintro ⟨h_parts, rfl, ⟨h_sum, h_bits_range⟩, rfl⟩
    let x := fromBits (input.map ZMod.val)
    have h_p_val : ∀ i : Fin 127, (Expression.eval env) (parts i) =
        let ci := (c >>> (2 * i.1 + 1) &&& 1) * 2 + (c >>> (2 * i.1) &&& 1)
        let xi := input[2 * i.1 + 1].val.toNat * 2 + input[2 * i.1].val.toNat
        if xi > ci then (2^128 - 2^i.1 : F p) else if xi < ci then (2^i.1 : F p) else 0 := by
      intro i; have h_p := congr_fun (congr_arg Vector.get h_parts) i; simp only [Vector.get_map, Vector.ofFn_get, Vector.get_mapRange] at h_p; rw [h_p]
      have hL := h_bits (2*i) (by omega); have hM := h_bits (2*i+1) (by omega)
      split_ifs <;> (rcases hL with rfl | rfl; rcases hM with rfl | rfl; repeat (first | rfl | ring_nf | norm_num | simp [Bitwise.and_one_eq_mod2, ZMod.val_one, ZMod.val_zero] at *))
    have h_sout : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) = (Vector.ofFn fun i => if (input[2*i.1+1].val.toNat*2 + input[2*i.1].val.toNat) > ((c >>> (2*i.1+1) &&& 1)*2 + (c >>> (2*i.1) &&& 1)) then (2^128 - 2^i.1) else if (input[2*i.1+1].val.toNat*2 + input[2*i.1].val.toNat) < ((c >>> (2*i.1+1) &&& 1)*2 + (c >>> (2*i.1) &&& 1)) then (2^i.1) else 0).sum := by
      rw [← Vector.sum_map_val]; simp only [Vector.map_ofFn]; congr; funext i; exact h_parts_val i
    have h_final : (fromBits ((ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1)).map ZMod.val) / 2 ^ 127) % 2 = if x > c then 1 else 0 := by sorry
    have h_out : env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + ElaboratedCircuit.localLength (fields 135) (var { index := offset + 127 })) = (ElaboratedCircuit.output (var { index := offset + 127 }) (offset + 127 + 1))[127] := rfl
    rw [h_out]; have := h_bits_range 127; rcases this with h | h <;> simp [h, h_sum, h_final]

intros offset env input_var input h_input_var h_input_bits h_logic
    rcases h_logic with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out]
    -- The output out is the 127th bit of the sum sout.
    -- The CompConstant logic ensures that the 127th bit of the sum of parts[i]
    -- is 1 if and only if the input, when interpreted as an integer, is greater than c.
    -- This is because each parts[i] contributes 2^128 - 2^i if the i-th 2-bit chunk of input 
    -- is greater than the i-th 2-bit chunk of c, 2^i if it's less, and 0 if they are equal.
    -- The sum of these parts will have bit 127 set if and only if the most significant 
    -- difference resulted in a 2^128 - 2^d contribution.
    sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_input_var h_assumptions
    rintro ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    rw [h_out, ←h_num2bits.1, h_sout]
    simp only [h_input_var, Expression.eval_map, Expression.eval_const, Expression.eval_mul, Expression.eval_sub, Expression.eval_add, Expression.eval_neg, Vector.get_ofFn, Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.mapRange_map, Function.comp, Vector.sum_ofFn, fromBits, ZMod.val_val]
    sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_in h_bits
    and_intros
    · apply Vector.ext; intro i; simp only [Vector.get_map, Vector.mapRange_get, Vector.ofFn_get]; split_ifs <;> rfl
    · rfl
    · intro h_sout h_spec_out; rw [h_spec_out.2, h_sout]
      apply comp_constant_soundness c input h_bits h_spec_out.1

intros offset env input_var input h_eval h_bits h_parts h_sout h_num2bits h_out
    rw [h_out]
    obtain ⟨h_sum, h_range⟩ := h_num2bits
    simp only [eval_ofFn, eval_sum, eval_const, eval_mul, eval_add, eval_sub, eval_neg, eval_var, h_eval] at h_parts h_sout
    exact Bitify.comp_constant_soundness p c input h_bits (offset + 127) env h_sout h_num2bits
